testcase.name: test_copyright
testcase.failure: test/test_copyright.py:23: in test_copyright assert rc == 0, 'Found errors' E AssertionError: Found errors E assert 1 == 0

testcase.name: test_flake8

failure.message: AssertionError: Found 16 code style errors / warnings: ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:12:100: E501 line too long (113 > 99 characters) ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:16:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:19:9: E303 too many blank lines (2) ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:19:35: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:22:1: W293 blank line contains whitespace ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:23:37: E712 comparison to False should be 'if cond is False:' or 'if not cond:' ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:39:1: E303 too many blank lines (4) ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:50:11: W292 no newline at end of file ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:13:100: E501 line too long (102 > 99 characters) ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:18:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:23:80: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:28:82: E712 comparison to False should be 'if cond is False:' or 'if not cond:' ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:34:83: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:39:83: E712 comparison to False should be 'if cond is False:' or 'if not cond:' ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:57:1: E303 too many blank lines (4) ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:68:11: W292 no newline at end of file assert 1 == 0

testcase.failure: test/test_flake8.py:23: in test_flake8 assert rc == 0, \ E AssertionError: Found 16 code style errors / warnings: E ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:12:100: E501 line too long (113 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:16:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) E ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:19:9: E303 too many blank lines (2) E ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:19:35: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' E ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:22:1: W293 blank line contains whitespace E ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:23:37: E712 comparison to False should be 'if cond is False:' or 'if not cond:' E ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:39:1: E303 too many blank lines (4) E ./dobot_end_effector/suction_cup_server.py:50:11: W292 no newline at end of file E ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:13:100: E501 line too long (102 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:18:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) E ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:23:80: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' E ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:28:82: E712 comparison to False should be 'if cond is False:' or 'if not cond:' E ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:34:83: E712 comparison to True should be 'if cond is True:' or 'if cond:' E ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:39:83: E712 comparison to False should be 'if cond is False:' or 'if not cond:' E ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:57:1: E303 too many blank lines (4) E ./dobot_end_effector/gripper_server.py:68:11: W292 no newline at end of file E assert 1 == 0
